name: 8-factor-github-actions
title: 8-factor-github-actions
summary: Audit GitHub Actions workflows for CI/CD reliability, permissions, caching, release automation, deployment safety, secrets handling, and reusable automation design.
recommended_trigger_phrases: Use the 8-factor-github-actions skill to review this workflow for CI/CD reliability, permissions, caching, release automation, and deployment safety.
review_protocol: Identify project type and user-facing goal.
Inspect relevant files and infer missing context conservatively.
Run available validation commands or record why they could not run.
